parameter.defaultValue: 1. Book an Event with 1 Guest for 1 hour with indoor type
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 2. Book an Event with invitee when invitee accepts with outddor
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@value='MessageInput Write a short message about the event...' or @accessibilityLabel='MessageInput' or @name='MessageInput' or @label='MessageInput' or @accessibilityIdentifier='MessageInput']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 3. Book an Event with 1 Participant and 1 Guest
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 4. Book an Event with invitee when Declines
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: //*[@value='MessageInput Write a short message about the event...' or @accessibilityLabel='MessageInput' or @name='MessageInput' or @label='MessageInput' or @accessibilityIdentifier='MessageInput']
parameter.name: Element

parameter.defaultValue: 5. Book an Event with more invitees and apply filter in wallet screen
parameter.name: Text
